task1.title: The layout of part of a building, indicating the position of the fire exits
task1.instruction: The diagram shows the layout of part of a building, indicating the position of the fire exits. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: Nowadays, many people decide to have their first child in their later life. What are the reasons? Do you think the advantages of this outweigh the disadvantages?
